name: IndiGo Axis Bank Premium Credit Card
exclusions: transactions excluded under IndiGo Axis Bank Premium Credit Card terms
milestoneBenefits: Voucher worth 5,000 IndiGo BluChips at annual spends of Rs 2 lakh
Voucher worth 5,000 IndiGo BluChips at annual spends of Rs 5 lakh
Voucher worth 5,000 IndiGo BluChips at annual spends of Rs 8 lakh
Voucher worth 5,000 IndiGo BluChips at annual spends of Rs 12 lakh
additionalBenefits: Voucher worth 5,000 IndiGo BluChips plus one complimentary 6E Eats voucher as welcome gift on payment of joining fee
Voucher worth 5,000 IndiGo BluChips plus one complimentary 6E Eats voucher every year as renewal benefit on payment of annual fee
7 IndiGo BluChips per Rs 100 on all IndiGo channels
3 IndiGo BluChips per Rs 100 on groceries and hotel spends
2 IndiGo BluChips per Rs 100 on other eligible categories
2 complimentary international lounge visits through Priority Pass
2 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per quarter, applicable on spends of Rs 50,000 in the preceding 3 months
Buy one get one movie ticket offer on BookMyShow once every month
Low forex markup of 2.5% on foreign currency transactions
Dining Delights offers through Axis Bank dining programme
EMI conversion available for transactions exceeding Rs 1,500

salaried: Primary cardholder should be 18 to 70 years of age, resident of India and have net income of at least Rs 6 lakh per annum
selfEmployed: Primary cardholder should be 18 to 70 years of age, resident of India and have net income of at least Rs 6 lakh per annum
